title: Bhagalpur–Muzaffarpur Jan Sewa Express
summary: The Bhagalpur–Muzaffarpur Jan Sewa Express is an Express train belonging to Eastern Railway zone that runs between Bhagalpur Junction and Muzaffarpur Junction in India. It is currently being operated with 13419/13420 train numbers on a daily basis.
text:
The Bhagalpur–Muzaffarpur Jan Sewa Express is an Express train belonging to Eastern Railway zone that runs between Bhagalpur Junction and Muzaffarpur Junction in India. It is currently being operated with 13419/13420 train numbers on a daily basis.

Service
The 13419/Jan Sewa Express has an average speed of 38 km/h and covers 240 km in 6h 35m. The 13420/Jan Sewa Express has an average speed of 35 km/h and covers 240 km in 6h 50m.

Route and halts
Coach composition
Primary Maintenance - Bhagalpur Coaching Depot

Traction
Both trains are hauled by a Ghaziabad Loco Shed-based WAP-7 or WAP-5 diesel locomotive from Bhagalpur to Muzaffarpur and vice versa.
